title: Canada Gazette Part II - Canada.ca
content:
## Canada Gazette Part II
The following regulatory proposals have been made into regulations and are published in Canada Gazette Part II . The publication contains the rationale for the regulatory proposal, the final regulations and the effective date. To facilitate a search, use the SOR (Statutory Orders and Regulations) number provided.
- Medical Devices Regulations - Amendment - Project 1461 (Quality Management System Certificate) (SOR/2009-303)
- Regulations Amending Schedule A to the Food and Drugs Act and the Medical Devices Regulations - Project 1539 (SOR/2007-289)
- Regulations Amending Certain Regulations Made under the Food and Drugs Act - Project 1539 (SOR/2007-288)
- Medical Devices Regulations - Project 1484 - Quality Management Systems - SOR/2006-197
- Medical Devices Regulations - Amendment - Project 1402 (Developing Countries) (SOR/2005-142)
- Medical Devices Regulations - Schedule No. 1101 (SOR/98-282)
- Fees in Respect of Medical Devices Regulations - Schedule No. 1102 (SOR/98-432)
- Medical Devices Regulations - Schedule No. 1162 - Amendment (SOR/2002-190)
- Medical Devices Regulations - Schedule No. 1293 - Quality Systems (SOR/2003-173)
